noveltyJustification: Four teardown-specific control classes and three source-versus-derived implications are new, while the underlying drift evidence refines prior iterations.
ruledOut: Fresh database means source drift is repaired

label: Merged durable research and triage, not one lineage, gate teardown
Phase 007 uses fresh confirmation, daemon stop, and explicit allowlist
Rebuild restores search function but not history or learned provenance
Source metadata contradictions survive a clean database rebuild
Some rename and track-root residue is rebuildable derived-index staleness
Operator-skipped topology residue is accepted but must remain explicit
Manifest-only checkpoints are not teardown rollback snapshots

direction: Treat teardown or rebuild as source-tree remediation
reason: A rebuild reindexes canonical files and cannot repair their semantic contradictions or restore deleted history
